## Summary

## Type of Problem

- [ ] Markdown formatting/rendering issue

## Location

File path(s) and section(s) involved.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to `...`
2. Run `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead.

## Environment

- OS:
- Claude Code version (if applicable):
- Additional context:

## Proposed Fix (Optional)

If you already know a likely fix, describe it here.
